thoughts_srcutils_srccollections_8463476.content: Build stage completed with status 'completed' but zero source files were created on disk. Glob confirms no files at expected paths.

facts_pipeline_846348684866.content: Verify actual file existence on disk rather than inferring success from a pipeline status field.

facts_pipeline_846350264797.content: A pipeline stage can report 'completed' without any actual work being done — always validate deliverables independently.

thoughts_pipeline_936133919109.content: Build stage reported 'completed' with zero files created on disk. Never trust build status alone — verify actual file existence via Glob or fs reads.

thoughts_newprojectsetup_936135116193.content: The task directory contains only metadata; the referenced codebase paths (src/collections/, src/utils/, src/auth/) don't exist yet. Files must be created fresh, not modified.

facts_pipeline_936136709091.content: When a stage shows status=completed but zero files exist, check whether the build step actually wrote to the correct working directory vs a stale/empty directory.

thoughts_code_review_process_97665409387.content: The diff only contained infrastructure/task metadata but no source code files — review must verify both that files exist AND that they are actually in the diff.

thoughts_implementation_scope_1037834370.content: The diff contained only task metadata files (`.kody/tasks/`), not the actual source code. Files must be created on disk, not just planned.

facts_task_workflow_1037835658156.content: When Glob confirms 0 results for expected files like `src/utils/hash-password.ts`, the previous step did no real work — start fresh rather than trying to iterate on its output.

thoughts_pipeline_stage_1048799278768.content: The diff from HEAD~1 contained only metadata files and no source code changes. The required deliverables (hash-password utility, User Payload collection, User service, User routes) were all missing fr
